birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Lagonosticta sanguinodorsalis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22728552A263912773 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22728552A263912773.en |access-date=3 June 2025}} | genus = Lagonosticta | species = sanguinodorsalis | authority = Payne, 1998 | range_map = Range Map.png | range_map_caption = Range map of rock firefinches }} The rock firefinch (Lagonosticta sanguinodorsalis) is a species of estrildid finch found in the Jos Plateau of central Nigeria and in Cameroon
